name: LOCKHEED MARTIN CORP
summary: Lockheed Martin is a global aerospace and defense technology company operating in four segments: Aeronautics, Missiles and Fire Control (MFC), Rotary and Mission Systems (RMS), and Space. Key products include the F-35 Lightning II fighter (27% of total sales), C-130 Hercules, F-16, F-22, PAC-3, THAAD, HIMARS, Javelin, Black Hawk helicopters, Aegis Combat System, Trident II D5 missile, and GPS III satellites. Primary customers are U.S. Government agencies and allied nations.
